requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a cozy bedroom bedside table. Use one adult with neutral skin tone as the only moving person or hand. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single, calm shot begins on a cozy bedside table. The exact portable LED lamp from the reference sits centered on a light-wood nightstand. To its left is a small paperback book, and to its right a small canvas travel pouch. The room has gentle evening ambience; the lamp is off. The camera remains steady with a slight, slow micro push-in. After a beat, an adult right hand in a light beige knit sleeve enters from the right, gently touches the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and blooms a soft, warm glow that clearly spreads onto the book’s pages, making the area feel cozy. The hand lightly lifts the lamp an inch to show it’s lightweight and compact, then sets it back down. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Lifestyle lets us place the lamp in a believable bedside routine where warm light and portability are obvious without complex mechanics. A single cozy scene with one hand turning it on sells both comfort and compactness credibly.

candidate_categories.reason: Shows the lamp in a real bedside/desk use occasion with natural warm light and a simple carry cue.
candidate_categories.risk: If the ambient lighting is too bright, the warm glow may be less noticeable.

candidate_categories.reason: A one-shot turn-on moment clearly demonstrates warm light output.
candidate_categories.risk: Focusing only on the light-on may underplay portability and lifestyle context.

candidate_categories.reason: Close-ups of compact form and diffuser can sell design and size.
candidate_categories.risk: May feel clinical and less emotive than a lifestyle scene.

creative_design.selling_angle: Cozy, warm light you can place anywhere—small enough to carry, perfect for bedside or desk moments.
creative_design.visual_grammar: One cozy bedside scene with gentle ambient light; the lamp is the hero with a simple hand interaction and a visible warm light patch.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Natural use: lamp turns on and casts a soft warm glow onto a nearby book; one-hand lift shows compact, easy-to-carry size.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: A quiet bedside table with the compact lamp beside a book and a small travel pouch, lamp still off.
creative_design.action_arc: From a calm bedside setup, a hand enters, gently touches the lamp to turn it on, warm light spreads across the book, then lifts and sets the lamp back to show its lightweight portability, ending on a cozy lit scene.
creative_design.payoff: The lamp sits glowing warmly beside the book and pouch, signaling comfort and portability.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Kept to one scene, one hand, and two simple props (book and small pouch). Avoided showing a tiny button press; the action is a gentle top touch. No bag insertion or complex mechanisms. The warm glow is a single noticeable light patch on the book for clear readability.

metadata.audio_direction: Soft, warm instrumental bed (light guitar). Add a subtle chime when the lamp turns on; gentle room tone throughout.
metadata.visual_prompt: A single, calm shot begins on a cozy bedside table. The exact portable LED lamp from the reference sits centered on a light-wood nightstand. To its left is a small paperback book, and to its right a small canvas travel pouch. The room has gentle evening ambience; the lamp is off. The camera remains steady with a slight, slow micro push-in. After a beat, an adult right hand in a light beige knit sleeve enters from the right, gently touches the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and blooms a soft, warm glow that clearly spreads onto the book’s pages, making the area feel cozy. The hand lightly lifts the lamp an inch to show it’s lightweight and compact, then sets it back down closer to the book, keeping the warm light on the pages. Hold a quiet moment on the glowing lamp, book, and pouch together in the same frame for a comfortable finish.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Portable LED Lamp.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A single, calm shot begins on a cozy bedside table. The exact portable LED lamp from the reference sits centered on a light-wood nightstand. To its left is a small paperback book, and to its right a small canvas travel pouch. The room has gentle.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Harsh overhead lighting or no light where you need it, and bulky lamps that aren’t convenient to move for bedtime.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=lifestyle; hook=A quiet bedside table with the compact lamp beside a book and a small travel pouch, lamp still off.; proof=Natural use: lamp turns on and casts a soft warm glow onto a nearby book; one-hand lift shows compact, easy-to-carry size.; payoff=The lamp.
Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: One adult with neutral skin tone; only the right hand and forearm appear.; Soft knit long-sleeve sweater in light beige to keep.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
